arts.ttl: Leverkusen inform Bayern of their Nübel interest
arts.sum: In search of a new goalkeeper for next season, Bayer Leverkusen set their sights on Alexander Nübel

arts.ttl: Report: Wirtz roulette takes another twist as Bayern contact family
arts.sum: Die Werkself's prized possession Florian Wirtz could be pried away from their grasp by Bayern Munich who are keen to get their man.

arts.ttl: Thomas Muller expected to continue playing career, per Sky Germany
arts.sum: The 35-year-old club legend may be heading for the exit door but opportunities in Italy and the USA appear to be materializing.

arts.ttl: Spurs keen to acquire Tel but likely to re-negotiate with Bayern
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is expected to depart the Allianz Arena in summer having impressed thus far on his loan spell at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Union Berlin preview: Die Werkself look to put pressure on Bayern
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will look to put the pressure on leaders Bayern Munich when they welcome Union Berlin for Saturday’s home meeting with Union Berlin.

arts.ttl: Kompany talks about a BVB player he once labelled “future Ballon d’Or candidate”
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany had high hopes for Julian Duranville’s career, but the Belgian struggled since his move to Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Dortmund 25-26 Goalkeeper Kit Design Leaked - Custom Colorway
arts.sum: We can exclusively reveal the colorway and design of Borussia Dortmund's 2025-2026 goalkeeper kit, showing a bright green design with yellow and orange accents.

arts.ttl: Report: Borussia Dortmund star Jamie Gittens is too expensive for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens was on Bayern’s list for a long time, but as things stand, the club will not pursue a move for him this summer due to the high price tag, the cost-cutting measures and the fact the club is saving money for Florian Wirtz, who is the main target this summer. According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (aa captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Borussia Dortmund star Jamie Gittens would cost too much money for Bayern Munich :

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany discusses Thomas Müller’s impact ahead of Borussia Dortmund clash
arts.sum: FC Bayern München trainer Vincent Kompany spoke on personnel matters ahead of this coming Saturday evening's "Top Spiel" against Borussia Dortmund at his Friday press conference.

arts.ttl: Niko Kovac responds to discussions linking Mats Hummels with Borussia Dortmund return
arts.sum: Niko Kovac has responded to the rumors cropping up on Friday regarding a possible return of Mats Hummels to Borussia Dortmund.
